reviews.review_description: good game but i bought samba nd london dlc and u cant change the goal size and are to big for my room ? update could add this? apart from the dlc i can play the game wth decent size goal in my room just dlc seem one size goals?

developer_response.body:
Hi blessedboxer - Thanks for the review, and glad to hear you’re enjoying the game overall.

For the London Cages and Favela DLC, the goal size is intentionally locked. Those environments are designed to replicate small-sided street football games, where the goals are fixed as part of the pitch setup and gameplay balance. 

Thanks again for supporting the game and for taking the time to share your feedback.

reviews.review_description:
Game got a pretty serious bug and even though the developers already moved on to their next game they still went back to fix it pretty quickly. Even offered a free dlc as compensation.
Also its the best VR GK game by far.

developer_response.body:
Hi Pancwake — thanks so much for your support, and we’re really sorry you’ve run into this issue.

The invisible portals in Quickfire definitely aren’t intended and we understand how frustrating that makes the mode to play. Our team was made aware of this bug and a fix is now live so you can enjoy Quickfire again!

We’d love to offer you a free DLC of your choice as a thank you for your patience. Just email us at info@incisiv.tech with your request and we’ll get that sorted for you.

Thanks again for playing and supporting our app!

reviews.review_description:
This game is insanely good. From the quick fire mechanics to training. This game has also helped me as a genuine gk. I do want a little bit more though for that price tag. One thing they should add is hand tracking. If you add hand tracking, add it so it works with goalie gloves on too, and make it work well. If the tracking stops mid shot, just make it assume where it would go based on the trajectory. Highly recommend though for aspiring goal keepers.

Edit - One of the developers reached out and said why they don’t have hand tracking, and it makes sense. The delay would make shots you should have saved go in. Definitely buy if you a gk!

developer_response.body: Hi Byt3Sized - thanks for the great review! We investigated putting hand tracking in the game before put we felt it took away from the experience rather than add to it due to the slight delay in tracking associated with hand tracking! We hope you understand and thanks so much for your kind words

reviews.review_description: It’s no challenge as I have played for a long time so please make new shots and every shot goes a different way because every penalty and situation I already know where it’s going to go so can you randomize it please it would make the game so much better

developer_response.body: Hi Lewis61635342 - thanks for the 5 star review! We're delighted you enjoy the game. Have you tried our Favelas or London Cages DLC? You can get both at a discount through the Samba and Streets Bundle. Or our Pro Keeper Bundle?  These will give you way more variety of shots. Also adjusting your goal size changes the types of shots you see

reviews.review_description: So I bought it right it has been improving my gk confidence i dont normally do reviews but this is to amazing to people saying its overpriced its really not buy this game

developer_response.body: Hi Joneszvr - Thank you so much for the amazing review! We’re really glad to hear the game is helping improve your GK confidence and that you feel it’s worth it. Your support means a lot to us!

developer_response.body: Hi Gkfotbal10 - CleanSheet Soccer's price reflects the years of development we have put in to make it the world's best goalkeeping game - we hope you enjoyed playing it despite finding it expensive!

They told me to contact with you because it's an addon. Can you please help to purchase Samba and streets bundle. I already paid over $11 for London cages. I am happy to pay remaining.

developer_response.body: Hi tareqaus - thanks for the 5 star review! We'd be very happy to help you with this problem. Can you please email us at support@incisiv.tech and we will assist?

reviews.review_description: The game is good but whenever I try to go outside to train it dosent work and my controls mess up, I also can’t even get a match in goalie wars

developer_response.body:
Hi Cookiebob1 - thanks for your review! We recognize it's often difficult to get a multiplayer match of Goalie Wars - that's what we made two Single Player versions of Goalie Wars called 'Sharp Shot' and 'Beat The Bot' - hopefully you like them! 

For playing outside, Meta headsets are built to be used indoors and rarely work well outdoors unless it's overcast (they don't like direct sunlight). How Quest headset works outdoors is out of our control unfortunately and has nothing to do with the CleanSheet Soccer app

reviews.review_description:
Firstly, Amazing game and helps me as a GK
But I wish you could add custom shots for free 
Because I know many kids with not to much money wouldn’t be able to afford Cleansheet pro 
As a subscription personally I wouldn’t pay a subscription ￼for pro I would rather pay a 1 time payment just like this game 
Thank you for your time 
Elliot

developer_response.body:
Hi Elliot - thanks so much for your 5 star review - It's amazing to hear it's helping you as a goalkeeper – that's why we do what we do :)

We totally get what you're saying about CleanSheet Pro and the subscription. A one-time payment often feels better, and we understand that.

Here's the thing: we're a small team, and we fund everything ourselves – no big company helping us out. Making and updating a game like CleanSheet, especially with all the cool new features coming in Pro (like custom shots!), costs real money. 

A subscription for CleanSheet Pro is the only way we can keep improving the game and keep our small team going. It means we can keep adding those awesome features you want and ensure CleanSheet has a long future.

We really appreciate you understanding and supporting us as we work to make CleanSheet Pro the best it can be!

Thanks again,
The CleanSheet Team

reviews.review_description: I love this game got me into goalkeeping and now I play for a professional academy (Liverpool U14) But can you make a feature where you can recreate shots from real games so like saving Ronaldo pens Messi pens and there free kicks I would love it so much and it would make that game 100x better

developer_response.body: Ozzy567 that's amazing to hear!! Our team is working very hard on CleanSheet Pro a new version of CleanSheet that includes career mode and a shot simulator!! This will allow you to recreate your own shots and try to save them? We've also designed some really cool drills to train reaction time, positioning and decision-making. You'll even get your own goalkeeper IQ metric and global leaderboard so you can see how good you are compared to all the other CleanSheet players across the world! Follow us on social media to keep updated with progress (TikTok @incisiv - YouTube @incisivsport).

Five stars, if there was 6 stars I would give it 6

developer_response.body:
P.Diddy696969 - thanks so much for your 5 star review and that you would have given it 6 stars if you had that option ;) 
We're delighted that you like the Creator Program and got your prize!! Hope you continue to play CleanSheet and enjoy all the different game modes. Keep an eye out for CleanSheet Pro that we'll launch in the Fall!

reviews.review_title: Gloves On, Game On – A VR Goalie Dream
reviews.review_description:
This VR game does a fantastic job at putting you in the gloves of a real goalkeeper. Whether you're catching, punching away shots, or throwing the ball back into play, it really nails the physicality and tension of being between the posts. The "Goalie War" multiplayer mode is a fun twist, using a pulley system to keep things dynamic and competitive.

There are multiple DLC options to spice things up with different themes like the Glove Bundle, London Cages, and the Samba Bundle — all adding more flavor and variety.

But the real standout for me is the "Set Play" mode. It’s incredibly immersive — you relive real attacking scenarios where strikers pass and move before taking a shot, and you're the final line of defense. The pressure is on, and it feels amazing when you make that big save.

If you're into football or just want a fresh VR challenge, this is a gem. ⚽🧤 Highly recommended!

developer_response.body: Hi metaquesta99 - Thanks so much for the glowing review — we're thrilled you're enjoying the intensity of Set Play (and its DLC) and its awesome you're getting in Goalie Wars! It's one of our favourites too

Thanks a lot.
The CleanSheet Team

Update:  Hi @machang713,  has the startup issue been resolved for you since our last game update?  If yes, we would grateful if you could update your review of our game.  Thanks

reviews.review_description: This is only hands. Can't kick in this game.

developer_response.body: Dear Danielcross1 - yes that's right this app uses the hand controllers so you can intercept but also throw the ball. Please note that the Meta Quest VR headset CANNOT accurately track lower limb movement. This is essential for any type of application that would involve kicking a ball. CleanSheet Pro, our professional version of CleanSheet used by elite soccer teams, uses another VR system that has sensors attached to the lower limbs. This gives accurate tracking and allows players to kick the ball. All the game play videos using the Quest clearly show gameplay involving the hands. We're sorry you were not aware of this before you purchased CleanSheet. I'm sure you can request a refund.

reviews.review_title: Love it, what a bright future
reviews.review_description: This game is absolutely amazing. I am a goalkeeper and expected this game to help me improve my skills somehow, and that actually happened. My reflexed soon improved and my eyes can follow better the ball at any pace. However, the game feels a bit... empty. There are two game modes, i love them both, but is nowhere close to some things they showed on TikTok, which is normal because the game can't reach as far as the pro version for teams. Also, the handling feels too easy compared to a real one and the stops with fists and open hands doesn't feel polished enough in my opinion. Love the game, love the way the devs are publicing it and I'm waiting for updates, because Cleansheet's future is very, very bright
